ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* The ISO 639-1 language code */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* The full name of the language */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* The name of the language in its native script */,
  "direction" TEXT /* The writing direction of the language (e.g., LTR, RTL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "up_to_date" INTEGER /* Percentage of content that is up-to-date */,
  "fuzzy" INTEGER /* Percentage of content that is fuzzy */,
  "not_translated" INTEGER /* Percentage of content that is not translated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the translation status */,
  "total_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words in the original content */,
  "total_fuzzy_words" INTEGER /* Total number of fuzzy words */,
  "total_not_translated_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words not translated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_status_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_status_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES translation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., translator, reviewer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the translation project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* The name of the client or department requesting the translation */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation project */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translator */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assignment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the assignment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the assignment */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES translation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation project */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "original_content" TEXT /* Original content to be translated */,
  "translated_content" TEXT /* Translated content */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translator */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., pending review, approved) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the translation was submitted */,
  "source_file" TEXT /* The source file or document from which the content is extracted */,
  "source_file_version" TEXT /* The version of the source file */,
  "target_file" TEXT /* The target file or document to which the translated content will be saved */,
  "target_file_version" TEXT /* The version of the target file */,
  "is_reviewed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the translation has been reviewed */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the translation */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* The timestamp when the translation was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES translation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the translation */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is the final review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the translation is approved */,
  "final_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the final reviewer */,
  "final_review_date" TEXT /* The timestamp of the final review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_final_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("final_reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_languages" (
  "project_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-language pair */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation project */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the language in the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_languages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES translation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the translation */,
  "translated_content" TEXT /* Translated content at this version */,
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translator */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the version was submitted */,
  "source_content_version" TEXT /* The version of the original content */,
  "is_major_change" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change is a major change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_history_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_history_translator_id FOREIGN KEY ("translator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the translation project */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "total_words" INTEGER /* Total number of words */,
  "translated_words" INTEGER /* Number of translated words */,
  "reviewed_words" INTEGER /* Number of reviewed words */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were recorded */,
  "fuzzy_words" INTEGER /* Number of fuzzy words */,
  "not_translated_words" INTEGER /* Number of words not translated */,
  "reviewed_fuzzy_words" INTEGER /* Number of fuzzy words that have been reviewed */,
  "reviewed_not_translated_words" INTEGER /* Number of words not translated that have been reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_statistics_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_statistics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES translation_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been archived */,
  "type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., assignment, review, deadline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
